name: Five Iron Golf
address: 11300 W Reno Ave Suite A, Yukon, OK 73099
about: Five Iron Golf is an indoor golf venue that combines simulator play with a full-service bar and restaurant experience. The facilities feature state-of-the-art Trackman golf simulator bays, high-speed swing cameras, and access to 200+ virtual golf courses, including PGA Tour venues like Pebble Beach. Each location offers a no-dress-code atmosphere designed to be accessible to both seasoned golfers and newcomers, with a lively social environment suitable for various occasions. Pricing is structured as hourly bay rentals, with rates varying by location, day, and time, and membership options providing free daily play and discounts on services.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to 200+ world-class virtual golf courses, including PGA Tour venues
Advanced Trackman launch monitors providing detailed swing and ball data
Full-service bar and chef-inspired menu available on-site
Flexible booking options with hourly rentals or membership plans
No-dress-code atmosphere making golf accessible and welcoming

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service bar and chef-inspired menu available at each location
Full-service bar with drink specials and discounts for members

simulator_hardware.notes: Custom-built simulators with dual-radar Trackman technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or rent them at the venue. Club fitting services are also available.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers a full-service bar and chef-inspired menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full 18-hole round typically takes 2-3 hours depending on simulator availability and pace of play.

faq.question: Is Five Iron Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior clinics and kids' party packages, making it suitable for families.
